tracks.title: Credit Card Basics
tracks.description: Understand what credit cards are, how they work, and how to use them responsibly.

tracks.title: Interest & Installments
tracks.description: Learn how interest works — simple vs. compound — and how installment plans affect total cost.

tracks.title: Emergency Fund
tracks.description: Learn why an emergency fund matters and how to start one realistically.

tracks.title: Understanding Loans
tracks.description: Demystify loans — types, terms, interest, and how to evaluate whether borrowing makes sense.

tracks.title: Spending Control
tracks.description: Learn how to track, categorize, and reduce unnecessary spending.

tracks.title: Digital Banking Safety
tracks.description: Understand how to protect yourself in the digital financial world.

tracks.title: Intro to Investing
tracks.description: Understand the very basics of investing — what it is, common types, and how to start thinking about it.
